segments.text: Creating space with aerials while pressing in - fair and bair denying any close-range window
segments.original_text: 詰める空中に移動し当たり距離が空けるが 空前 空中後ろで密着を拒否

segments.text: Excellent bomb usage! Grab into forward smash off the up tilt spacing - perfectly executed!
segments.original_text: ボムをとても生かしつつ 上強上強動くの待つような掴みからの横スマがうまく行ったー!

full_text: Creating space with aerials while pressing in - fair and bair denying any close-range window Excellent bomb usage! Grab into forward smash off the up tilt spacing - perfectly executed! Incredible!
